project_type: Next.js 16 multi-tenant SaaS CRM with App Router
build_system: npm with Next.js build, no Docker needed for type checking
test_framework: vitest for unit tests, playwright for e2e
verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit from the project root and confirm 0 errors
environment_constraints: No database available, no Docker daemon. Validation is TypeScript type-checking only.
contribution_requirements: All changes must pass npx tsc --noEmit with 0 errors
key_patterns: API routes use requireAuth from @/lib/auth/middleware, fireWebhooks from @/lib/webhooks. Sidebar uses NAV_SECTIONS array in components/tenant/layout/sidebar.tsx. API key auth uses tryApiKeyAuth from @/lib/auth/api-key (already integrated into requireAuth as first-class fallback). The WebhookEvent type in lib/webhooks.ts defines valid event names.
directory_structure: app/ = Next.js App Router pages and API routes. lib/ = shared utilities. components/ = React components. drizzle/ = DB schema and migrations.
